title: osmanthus marginatus var. pachyphyllus
intro: Osmanthus marginatus var. pachyphyllus, also known as sweet osmanthus or sweet olive, is a shrub-like plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Osakazura family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Osmanthus marginatus var. pachyphyllus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Osmanthus marginatus var. pachyphyllus can be prepared as teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements, which are often consumed to promote relaxation and well-being.
